title: AgentOps Worker Spec
description: Per-worker model + tool + prompt isolation spec consumed by /crank and /swarm at spawn time. See skills/crank/references/worker-specs.md.

version.description: Schema version. Always 1 for this file.

model.description: Model identifier for this worker. `inherit` uses the lead agent's model. `local-ollama` and `local-llamacpp` require an endpoint set via env or runtime config.

tools.description: Allowed tool list for this worker. Empty array means no tools (read-only reasoning). Omit to inherit lead's tool set.

prompt.description: Path to a prompt template file (relative to repo root). Worker spawn prepends this prompt to the per-task instructions.

effort.description: Reasoning effort. low = haiku-tier, medium = sonnet-tier, high = opus-tier. Cross-checked against `model` at spawn time.

timeout_seconds.description: Per-task timeout for this worker. Default 600 (10 min).
